title: Rebuild 10 and 20 showing in Australia
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild 1.0 and 2.0 showing in Australia!             Quote Post by esselfortium » Fri Sep 04, 2009 2:38 pm I'm not sure if this has already been mentioned somewhere, but someone in the Rebuild thread on SomethingAwful linked to this yesterday, an AnimeNewsNetwork article announcing that Rebuild 1.0 and 2.0 are both going to be showing at Madman Entertainment's "Reel Anime" this year. Madman's site for it (linked in the article) is currently only showing info from last year so I have no idea about the specifics, but hearing that 2.0 is going to be shown somewhere outside of Japan this year sounds like good news to me, even though I'm on the wrong continent to see it. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Fri Sep 04, 2009 2:46 pm Bloody hell! Australia too? I'm wondering if we in the UK will ever get our chance to see Rebuild on the big screen!

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Fri Sep 04, 2009 5:11 pm Awesome AWESOME AWESOME

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Sep 04, 2009 6:48 pm I completely overlooked this thread at first because I read "1.0" and "showing" and moved on. I'm glad I gave this a second look.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Fri Sep 04, 2009 8:03 pm Them Australians got it pretty good. I still don't see why a simultaneous release globally can't be arranged or would that require more money from Gainax?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Sep 04, 2009 9:16 pm wonderluster wrote: Them Australians got it pretty good. I still don't see why a simultaneous release globally can't be arranged or would that require more money from Gainax?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Sep 04, 2009 9:57 pm Here you go: http://www.evageeks.org/2009/09/1-0-and-2-0-screening-in-australia/

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Fri Sep 04, 2009 10:45 pm Damn you, Australia, from C.C. to Rebuild, you get all the good stuff! Damn you!

[]:             Quote Post by Zeak » Fri Sep 04, 2009 11:12 pm hmm. I know last year 1.0 screened in gold class at crown. (I went as saw it :) ). Still this is news to me also makes me wonder now if madman will get the distribution rights for 2.0 instead of redant. Only thing that im a little concerned about is the effect ADV kicking the bucked will have on the distribution of the original series.

[]:             Quote Post by Iam(not)toji » Fri Sep 04, 2009 11:46 pm I might be a complete idiot for asking this, but does this mean they are showing it with an official english sub? or a decent one? what's going on with that?

[]:             Quote Post by Tequila » Sat Sep 05, 2009 1:52 am WOO-HOO Finally! Australia gets some love! @(not)toji: If they are going to officially show it in a non-jap speaking country, wouldn't it make sense to have an offical sub as well? Simple logic, man. I'm sure that it will be decent. If not...Well, what can we do about it?

[]:             Quote Post by Desty_Nova » Sat Sep 05, 2009 3:10 am Where in australia? I might take some holidays and go see this.

[]:             Quote Post by Tequila » Sat Sep 05, 2009 5:56 am Well, Last year's Reel Anime took place in select cinemas in all major cities. They were: Sydney @ Dendy Newtown Perth @ Luna Leederville Adelaide @ Palace Nova Melbourne @ Kino Cinemas Brisbane @ Dendy George St Canberra @ Dendy Canberra That's what happened in 2008. I see no reason why that would change this year.

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Sat Sep 05, 2009 9:22 am Surely there'd be a showing in Sydney...

[]:             Quote Post by Kanchan » Sat Sep 05, 2009 6:08 pm Alright, you Aussies know what to do.

[]:             Quote Post by Zeak » Sat Sep 05, 2009 6:36 pm Yep all go to that same movie theater and enjoy the fact that we are watching 2.0 Sorry NAW but my camera is in Sydney and I doubt ill'd be able to get in in here. I'm sure all you guys are happy with the crappy cam rip anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by Tequila » Sat Sep 05, 2009 8:54 pm Heh, Well played, Zeak. Just be patient. It will come around eventually. to all you americans out there, You have no idea about how Irritating it is to have to wait months and months and months after every other english speaking country gets to watch these movies and having to desperatly resist the tempation to spoil yourself. So you can, for once, live with putting up for a bit longer. *pant* Sorry, just had to get that off my chest.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Sep 05, 2009 9:42 pm Um, I'm not sure what you mean because the states have the same problem as you guys do, especially with 2.0. 1.0 for example was only screened at some international film festivals instead of anywhere in the States, IIRC. Case in point: it seems 2.0 is being shown everywhere else BUT the U.S. which is part (I think at least) the reason why some people are resorting to that crappy cam-rip; though also there is the factor of wanting to see the darn film instead of just staying spoiler-free.

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Sat Sep 05, 2009 11:46 pm Tequila refers to every other piece of media in existence that comes out sometimes as much as a year earlier in the states before we can get our PAL version, not to mention the number of games that never get a PAL release

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Sep 06, 2009 1:25 am Oh, I see. And wow that really must suck.
